pages.raw_text:
Congressman Jones' reply to the
attack made on him recently by
c. o. Young, state organizer of the
American Federation of Labor, has
created quite a stir among local
union men. That Young has in
structions to offer opposition to
Jones is not doubted here. In fact
some of the delegates to the meet.
ing of the State Federation of La
Dor are reported to have seen the
letter from Gompers instructing
Young to make fight on Jones.


There are many local union men
who believe Gompers' fight Is a
personal one. They say that Jones
did not make suitable reply to a
letter from Gompers, thus causing
the head of the big labor organiza-
ton to take umbrage and to single
him out for determination.


BY many members of local
unions Jones is regarded as the
most capable representative the
state has in congress. They also
claim that he Is the most friendly
to labor of any of the delegation
from this state. 1t is known that
he has at various times done the
unions service, even to securing
the removal of government repre-.
sentatives who he found were dis
eliminating against the organized
worker, this action being taken at
the request of the unions.


1t is pointed out that Gompers
has made no mention of Cushman.
the Tacoma congressman who at
times has announced himself ready
to wade in blood to his knees IL
the labor unions continued a course
which, in Cushman's estimation,
means destruction to everybody.
And anybody who has gazed upon
Cushman will instantly realize that
the food of blood that reached to
his lofty knee joints would have
to be high tide in the history of
human gore.


There is no mention made of
Humphreys record either in be-
half Of labor and the elevation OF
Sen. Ankeny as champion of or
ganized labor is also just little
bit sudden.


While the local unionists have
great respect for Gompers, they
fully realize that he can make mis-
takes, and many there are who be-
lieve he has made big one in at.
lacking jones.
